---
title: "Satellites and Bedrock"
description: |
  Looking at the ways in which satellite images from Sentinel could be used to examine underlying bedrock types.
author:
  - name: Eugene
    url: https://www.fizzics.ie
date: 2023-01-17
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```
